metaDescription: Grand Canyon Home Services AI receptionist demo for HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and gas fireplace calls in West Valley Phoenix.
lede: A voice receptionist for Grand Canyon Home Services that answers HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and gas fireplace calls across the West Valley — qualifies the job, captures the caller, and books the visit.
servicesSub: Tuned for a family-owned home services company that never sells work people don't need — honest, no-pressure, and awake for every call.

cards.title: Cooling & Heating
cards.text: Triages no-cooling emergencies in Phoenix heat, repair vs. replace questions, duct work, and mini splits — capturing city, symptom, and urgency.

cards.title: Plumbing
cards.text: Handles water heater failures, softeners, and leak calls, then collects contact details and a preferred time window for same-day service.

cards.title: Electrical & Fireplaces
cards.text: Qualifies electrical repairs and gas log fireplace service, and mentions free estimates, second opinions, and the Total Care Club.

testSub: A live pitch script — watch it triage urgency, respect the no-pressure brand, and never make up pricing.

testLines.title: Emergency triage
testLines.line: My AC just died and it's 112 degrees here in Surprise.

testLines.title: Pricing handoff
testLines.line: How much does a new water heater cost?

testLines.title: Service area
testLines.line: Do you cover Sun City West? My ceiling fan keeps tripping the breaker.
